_comment: Deterministic QA scenario — TX1 742 Birchwood Lane NE, GMAIL provider (BACKLOG-1851 / epic BACKLOG-1847). Same corpus + contact set as tx1-birchwood.json; the expected (subject, shifted-date) membership is corpus-derived and therefore provider-independent UNTIL a live Gmail ingest proves a normalization delta (BACKLOG-1806). This cell is GATED on the Google Workspace tenant (BACKLOG-1845): with no token the harness reports GATED (non-fail), never FAILED. PER-PROVIDER manifest per founder decision 3 (2026-07-06).
description: TX1 742 Birchwood Lane NE, Tumwater WA — Gmail auto-link ceremony (GATED on BACKLOG-1845)
_sourceTimezone_comment: IANA tz of the corpus authors. Gmail stores internalDate as epoch-ms UTC; H3 (db-assert.js) converts sent_at into this zone to match (subject, shifted-date). The 4 UTC-boundary rows (Date >= 16:00 -0800) are the most likely provider divergence vs Outlook — pending live validation (BACKLOG-1845). Now formalized in ScenarioManifest/zod by H4 (BACKLOG-1851).

seed._comment: Gmail seeding inputs consumed by scripts/qa/email/seed-gmail.py. tokenFile is the GATING signal: absent => the Gmail cell reports GATED (BACKLOG-1845). Provide a real Google Workspace demo-mailbox OAuth token to activate.
